title: Implement WebRTC DataChannels
description: Architect low-latency, non-media data transfer pipelines using WebRTC DataChannels. Implement WebRTC DataChannels with configurable reliability (SCTP) for applications like gaming and real-time collaboration.
objectives: Architect low-latency, non-media data transfer pipelines using WebRTC DataChannels.
Implement WebRTC DataChannels with configurable reliability (SCTP) for applications like gaming and real-time collaboration.
